_comment: R-requirement-claim-is-atomic / R-check-method-is-atomic ratchet baseline (Wave 2, 2026-07-02). Frozen list of ids that audit_atomicity.py's own classification functions (_audit_claim / _audit_invariant, re-derived live against the loaded domain graph -- NOT the possibly-stale generated docs/gen/AUDIT.md, whose GEN_DIR is hardcoded to the repo-root docs/gen and is a separate pre-existing staleness issue out of this wave's scope) currently flag COMPOUND. Existing debt is honestly frozen here (not silently re-litigated), and test_atomicity_ratchet.py fails RED the moment a COMPOUND id appears that is NOT in this list (a genuinely new compound claim/check introduced after this baseline). Removing an id from this list (because it was split/atomized) is always allowed and expected to shrink the set over time; the test does not enforce shrinkage, only forbids growth beyond this frozen set. R-agent-imports-framework and R-task-spawn-is-ephemeral remain here even though they are now REJECTED (Wave 2 split) -- audit_atomicity.py does not filter by status, and their REJECTED claim text is frozen historical prose (R-rejected-preserved-not-deleted), not live debt; kept in the baseline so the ratchet does not need special-casing for status.
